name: Telegram Ape Button Agent
description: Telegram launcher template that turns a bot command into a capped trade intent preview with receipt-gated signals and client-side signing.
degenPitch: Ape button in Telegram, brakes included.
whatItDoes: Shows max pain and fee waterfall before paid unlocks.
Creates client-signed trade intents instead of backend-signed trades.
cursorPrompt: Build a Telegram Ape Button Agent with DNA x402. Add Telegram commands that show max pain, quote paid signals, verify receipts, create user-confirmed Jupiter intents, and keep bot tokens/wallet keys local.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Telegram Ape Button Agent with DNA x402. Add Telegram commands that show max pain, quote paid signals, verify receipts, create user-confirmed Jupiter intents, and keep bot tokens/wallet keys local.
exampleFlow: Bot shows max pain and signal preview
DNA x402 receipt unlocks full signal
receiptProofBehavior: Risk profile hash is displayed before intent.
